3090510.name: Emby Battle
3090510.description: Immerse yourself in the thrilling world of Embodied Tournament, an innovative auto-battle game where strategy and collection intertwine. Collect unique heroes and cards, prepare for epic battles against opponents from around the world. Use tactics to dominate the arena, upgrade your heroes, and climb the leaderboards. Embodied Tournament offers a dynamic and captivating gaming experience that will appeal to fans of card games and strategy.
3090510.supported_languages:
法语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
